description: MCP server for Domotz network monitoring — agents, devices, alerts, and network discovery.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/domotz-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Domotz Public API key (generated in the Domotz portal)
environmentVariables.name: DOMOTZ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Domotz Public API base URL for the regional endpoint (e.g. https://api-us-east-1-cell-1.domotz.com/public-api/v1)
environmentVariables.name: DOMOTZ_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Domotz
